BDI_II.responses: {"Q0":"0. I do not feel sad.","Q1":"0. I am not discouraged about my future.","Q2":"0. I do not feel like a failure.","Q3":"0. I get as much pleasure as I ever did from the things I enjoy.","Q4":"1. I feel guilty over many things I have done or should have done.","Q5":"0. I don't feel I am being punished.","Q6":"0. I feel the same about myself as ever.","Q7":"1. I am more critical of myself than I used to be.","Q8":"0. I don't have any thoughts of killing myself.","Q9":"0. I don't cry anymore than I used to.","Q10":"1. I feel more restless or wound up than usual.","Q11":"0. I have not lost interest in other people or activities.","Q12":"0.
